## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run check` passes.
- [ ] `npm run build:tauri` passes if relevant.
- [ ] Smoke tested if UI behavior changed.
- [ ] Screenshots included for UI changes.
- [ ] Security implications reviewed.
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, private keys, or credential-bearing URLs are included.
- [ ] Documentation updated if needed.

## Testing

List the checks and manual tests you ran.

## Screenshots

Add screenshots for UI changes.
